name: How's fault decided in my Utah work comp claim?

mainEntity.name: How's fault decided in my Utah work comp claim?

acceptedAnswer.description: No fault determination needed—it's no-fault for work injuries, covering you regardless.[1][2] Key factors: Only if work-related. Practical guidance: Avoid fault talks with insurer; report facts. Simplifies vs. lawsuits.[1] Benefits flow faster.[2]
